_comment: 智能问数 SQL 模板库 — 由 /kg/ontology 加载并按 applicable_metric_id / applicable_formula_id 关联到指标/公式节点。LLM 生成 SQL 时优先复用这些骨架。占位符约定：{startDate} {endDate} {shift} {productSpecCode} {lineNo} {levelList:csv} {levelList:in}

templates.name: 单指标重量聚合
templates.description: 按时间窗 + 等级筛选，统计满足条件的检测重量合计。适用于任意 ReportConfig 指标。

parameters.name: judgeColumn
parameters.desc: 判定列名（来自指标 formula.column_name），如 F_FIRST_INSPECTION

templates.sql_template:
SELECT SUM(F_SINGLE_COIL_WEIGHT) AS matched_weight
FROM lab_intermediate_data
WHERE F_DeleteMark IS NULL
  AND F_PROD_DATE >= '{startDate}'
  AND F_PROD_DATE < DATE_ADD('{endDate}', INTERVAL 1 DAY)
  AND {judgeColumn} IN ({levelList:in})
sample_questions: 本月一次交检 A 类的重量是多少？
上周甲班 B 级总产量？

templates.name: 单指标占比
templates.description: 命中等级重量 / 总重量 = 占比。一次交检合格率、A 类占比等都走这个模板。
templates.sql_template:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN {judgeColumn} IN ({levelList:in}) THEN F_SINGLE_COIL_WEIGHT ELSE 0 END) AS matched_weight,
  SUM(F_SINGLE_COIL_WEIGHT) AS total_weight,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN {judgeColumn} IN ({levelList:in}) THEN F_SINGLE_COIL_WEIGHT ELSE 0 END)
        / NULLIF(SUM(F_SINGLE_COIL_WEIGHT), 0) * 100, 2) AS matched_rate
FROM lab_intermediate_data
WHERE F_DeleteMark IS NULL
  AND F_PROD_DATE >= '{startDate}'
  AND F_PROD_DATE < DATE_ADD('{endDate}', INTERVAL 1 DAY)
sample_questions: 上月 A 类占比多少？

templates.name: 班次对比
templates.description: 按 F_SHIFT 分组，对比甲/乙/丙三班的总产量和指标占比。
templates.sql_template:
SELECT F_SHIFT AS shift,
  SUM(F_SINGLE_COIL_WEIGHT) AS total_weight,
  SUM(CASE WHEN {judgeColumn} IN ({levelList:in}) THEN F_SINGLE_COIL_WEIGHT ELSE 0 END) AS matched_weight,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN {judgeColumn} IN ({levelList:in}) THEN F_SINGLE_COIL_WEIGHT ELSE 0 END)
        / NULLIF(SUM(F_SINGLE_COIL_WEIGHT), 0) * 100, 2) AS matched_rate
FROM lab_intermediate_data
WHERE F_DeleteMark IS NULL
  AND F_PROD_DATE >= '{startDate}'
  AND F_PROD_DATE < DATE_ADD('{endDate}', INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY F_SHIFT
ORDER BY F_SHIFT
sample_questions: 上周哪个班次合格率最高？

templates.name: 日趋势
templates.description: 按 DATE(F_PROD_DATE) 分组的日度指标占比，用于绘制趋势线。
templates.sql_template:
SELECT DATE(F_PROD_DATE) AS prod_date,
  SUM(F_SINGLE_COIL_WEIGHT) AS total_weight,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN {judgeColumn} IN ({levelList:in}) THEN F_SINGLE_COIL_WEIGHT ELSE 0 END)
        / NULLIF(SUM(F_SINGLE_COIL_WEIGHT), 0) * 100, 2) AS matched_rate
FROM lab_intermediate_data
WHERE F_DeleteMark IS NULL
  AND F_PROD_DATE >= '{startDate}'
  AND F_PROD_DATE < DATE_ADD('{endDate}', INTERVAL 1 DAY)
GROUP BY DATE(F_PROD_DATE)
ORDER BY prod_date
sample_questions: 本月每天的一次交检合格率

templates.name: 不合格分类统计
templates.description: 按 F_FIRST_INSPECTION 分组统计每种不合格类型的重量与占比（Top N）。

parameters.name: qualifiedLevels
parameters.desc: 合格等级列表（用于排除），默认 ['A','B']

templates.sql_template:
SELECT F_FIRST_INSPECTION AS category,
  SUM(F_SINGLE_COIL_WEIGHT) AS weight,
  ROUND(SUM(F_SINGLE_COIL_WEIGHT) / NULLIF((
    SELECT SUM(F_SINGLE_COIL_WEIGHT) FROM lab_intermediate_data
    WHERE F_DeleteMark IS NULL
      AND F_PROD_DATE >= '{startDate}'
      AND F_PROD_DATE < DATE_ADD('{endDate}', INTERVAL 1 DAY)
  ), 0) * 100, 2) AS rate
FROM lab_intermediate_data
WHERE F_DeleteMark IS NULL
  AND F_PROD_DATE >= '{startDate}'
  AND F_PROD_DATE < DATE_ADD('{endDate}', INTERVAL 1 DAY)
  AND F_FIRST_INSPECTION NOT IN ({qualifiedLevels:in})
GROUP BY F_FIRST_INSPECTION
ORDER BY weight DESC
LIMIT {limit}
sample_questions: 上月哪种缺陷重量最多？

templates.name: 明细查询
templates.description: 按指定条件返回原始明细，常用于「找出所有 X 级炉号」这类问题。

parameters.name: levelList
parameters.desc: 筛选的等级；不传则返回全部

templates.sql_template:
SELECT F_FURNACE_NO_FORMATTED AS furnace_no,
  F_PROD_DATE AS prod_date,
  F_SHIFT AS shift,
  F_FURNACE_BATCH_NO AS furnace_batch_no,
  F_PRODUCT_SPEC_CODE AS product_spec_code,
  F_SINGLE_COIL_WEIGHT AS single_coil_weight,
  F_FIRST_INSPECTION AS first_inspection,
  F_LABELING AS labeling
FROM lab_intermediate_data
WHERE F_DeleteMark IS NULL
  AND F_PROD_DATE >= '{startDate}'
  AND F_PROD_DATE < DATE_ADD('{endDate}', INTERVAL 1 DAY)
  AND ('{levelList:csv}' = '' OR {judgeColumn} IN ({levelList:in}))
ORDER BY F_PROD_DATE DESC, F_SHIFT, F_FURNACE_BATCH_NO
LIMIT {limit}
sample_questions: 本月所有 C 级炉号
上周甲班的不合格明细

placeholder_format._comment: 占位符填充规则说明（供 NLQ Agent 实现参数替换）
placeholder_format.{name:csv}: 数组用逗号拼接，如 ['A','B'] -> A,B
placeholder_format.{name:in}: 数组转 SQL IN 子句，如 ['A','B'] -> 'A','B'

table_context._comment: 主表元数据，供 NLQ Agent 校验/补充字段
